summary: Implement a new 'Products' page to display a list of e-commerce products with 'Add to Cart' functionality. The page will use Shadcn UI components for product cards and be accessible via a new route.

steps.description: Create the ProductsPage.tsx component. This component will be responsible for displaying a grid of e-commerce products, each within a Shadcn Card component. It will include mock product data for initial display.
steps.details: Create a new file `client/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx`. This file will define the `ProductsPage` functional component. It will import `Button`, `Card`, `ScrollArea` from Shadcn UI and `ShoppingCart` icon from `lucide-react`. Mock product data will be defined within the component. Each product will be rendered as a `Card` containing an image, name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. The 'Add to Cart' button will initially log the product ID to the console.

steps.description: Integrate the new ProductsPage into the application's routing by adding a new route in App.tsx. This will make the products page accessible via the '/products' URL.
steps.details: Modify `client/src/App.tsx` to import `ProductsPage.tsx`. Add a new `<Route>` component within the `<Routes>` block with `path="/products"` and `element={<ProductsPage />}`. Optionally, add a navigation link to the header/navbar for easy access to the new products page.

steps.description: Test the new products page to ensure it renders correctly and the 'Add to Cart' button functions as expected (logging to console).
steps.details: Start the development server. Navigate to `/products` in the browser. Verify that multiple product cards are displayed, each with an image, name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Open the browser's developer console and click several 'Add to Cart' buttons to confirm that the product ID is logged for each click.

risks: The `react-router-dom` library might not be installed or correctly configured, leading to routing errors when trying to access `/products`.
Placeholder image URLs might become invalid or be blocked, causing broken image icons on the products page.
The styling of the product cards and grid might require further adjustments to align with the overall website's design system.
rollback_strategy: To roll back, revert the changes made to `client/src/App.tsx` by removing the new `ProductsPage` import and the `/products` route. Then, delete the newly created file `client/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx`.
success_criteria: The 'Products' page is successfully created and accessible at the `/products` URL. It displays a grid of at least six distinct product cards, each showing an image, name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Clicking any 'Add to Cart' button logs a message to the browser console indicating the product that was 'added'.
original_request: create a products page containg lots of ecomerse products and a button to add them to the cart
